title: THE SAND...
description: DO YOU LOVE SAND? I DO... YOU MUST ESCAPE THE SAND...
body:

# I LOVE THE SAND... DO YOU?
### this is a modpack about sand...
your goal is to escape "THE SAND" (infinite desert)
it has "quests" and also features awesome mods like:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- GregTECH
- Atum (sand dimension)
- sandstone tools mod 





it has weather and tough as nails(temp/drink mod)
</details>

### DIFICULTY = 100000 (verry hard moddpack))
### 

YOU want to play this beacause of saannandd


we also recommend you play this with the base settings provided by the mod for the best experience
and maybe get a optimization mod we couldnt add for copyright reasons?

please think about sand sand

this modpack made by yomi factory mod

:)

modpack originally made in one day
